project_info.name: TripLedger
project_info.tagline: Smart group expense tracking with optimized settlements
project_info.problem_statement: Groups face confusion and friction when splitting shared expenses after trips or events. Manual calculation leads to errors, unfair settlements, and excessive transactions.
project_info.solution: A web platform that allows users to track shared expenses and automatically compute optimized settlements with minimal transactions.

tables.name: trips

columns.name: created_by
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

rls_policies: SELECT: Members can view their trips (USING is_trip_member(id) OR auth.uid() = created_by)
INSERT: Authenticated users can create trips (WITH CHECK auth.uid() = created_by)
UPDATE: Only owner can update trip (USING is_trip_owner(id))
DELETE: Only owner can delete trip (USING is_trip_owner(id))

tables.name: trip_members
tables.description: Associates users with trips and defines their roles

columns.name: trip_id
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES trips(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: user_id
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

rls_policies: SELECT: Members can view trip membership
DELETE: Owner can remove members OR user can remove themselves

tables.name: expenses
tables.description: Records individual expenses within a trip

columns.name: trip_id
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES trips(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: paid_by
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

rls_policies: INSERT: Members can add expenses (paid_by must be self)
DELETE: Payer or trip owner can delete expense

tables.name: expense_participants
tables.description: Maps which users are involved in splitting a specific expense

columns.name: expense_id
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES expenses(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: user_id
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

rls_policies: SELECT: Members can view expense participants

tables.name: settlements
tables.description: Records optimized debt settlements between users

columns.name: trip_id
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES trips(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: from_user
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: to_user
columns.constraints: NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

rls_policies: SELECT: Trip members can view settlements
INSERT: Trip members can create settlements
UPDATE: Participants (from_user or to_user) can update settlement status

views.name: user_profiles
views.description: Exposes user id and email from auth.users for invitation lookups

functions.name: is_trip_member(trip_id UUID)
functions.description: Checks if the authenticated user is a member of the given trip.

functions.name: is_trip_owner(trip_id UUID)
functions.description: Checks if the authenticated user has the 'owner' role for the given trip.

middleware.description: Intercepts requests to protect routes. Redirects unauthenticated users from '/app/*' to '/auth/login', and authenticated users from '/auth/*' to '/app/dashboard'. Refreshes Supabase session cookies.

supabase_clients.server: lib/supabase/server.ts (Handles cookie-based auth for RSCs and API routes)

GET.description: Fetches all trips where the user is a member.
GET.response: Array of trips including member roles.

POST.description: Creates a new trip. Parses name/description via Zod. Inserts into 'trips', then inserts the creator into 'trip_members' as 'owner'.

GET.description: Fetches all members for a specific trip, joining with the user_profiles view to get emails.

POST.description: Invites a user by email. Looks up user ID in user_profiles, inserts into trip_members.

GET.description: Fetches all expenses for a trip, including who paid and the participants involved.

POST.description: Creates an expense. Inserts into 'expenses', then bulk inserts into 'expense_participants' for all users involved.
POST.body_schema: { description: string, amount: number, paid_by: string, participants: string[] }

GET.description: Fetches pending and completed settlements for a trip.

POST.description: Calculates settlements. This endpoint acts as a trigger to compute the optimized settlement graph based on current expenses and save it to the database.

steps: 1. Calculate net balance for every member: `Total Paid - Total Share`.
2. Separate members into `debtors` (negative balance) and `creditors` (positive balance).
3. Sort both lists by absolute amount descending.
4. Iterate through debtors and creditors, matching the largest debtor with the largest creditor to generate a transaction.
5. Adjust balances and repeat until all balances are near 0.

styling.globals: app/globals.css (Defines custom utility classes for the glassmorphism design system: .glass-card, .glass-panel, custom button and input variants)
styling.theme: Dark navy background with violet accents, heavy use of backdrop-blur for glass effects.

routing_structure.description: Authentication entry point. Renders the AuthForm.
Registration entry point. Also renders the AuthForm.
Main protected view. Shows user stats (total trips, expenses) and a grid of Trip Cards. Contains the 'New Trip' modal.
Dynamic route for a specific trip. Contains integrated tabs for Expenses, Members, and Settlements.
Global view for all cross-trip settlements (informational).

layout.Sidebar: components/layout/Sidebar.tsx - Navigation drawer with links to Dashboard, Settlements, Profile, and a Logout button.

auth.AuthForm: components/auth/AuthForm.tsx - Tabbed interface for Login/Signup using Supabase auth.signInWithPassword and signUp.

trips.CreateTripModal: UI modal triggered from Dashboard to POST to /api/trips.
trips.TripCard: Visual representation of a trip on the dashboard.

trip_details.TripTabs: components/trips/TripTabs.tsx - Client component managing state between 'Expenses', 'Members', and 'Settlements' views.
trip_details.AddExpenseModal: Form to input description, amount, payer, and select participants to split among.
trip_details.AddMemberModal: Form to invite a user by email.
trip_details.SettlementView: Visual graph/list showing who owes whom.

functions: cn(...inputs): Merges tailwind classes using clsx and tailwind-merge.
formatDate(date): Formats ISO strings into human readable dates.
